widgets_values:
Video ngan day tieng Nhat duong pho voi linh vat HeyJ (cho Shiba vang, 2D flat cartoon).
Chu de: Japanese slang to sound like a local
So canh: 11 (Hook + Setup + 7 tu vung + Ending + CTA)

Kich ban chi tiet:
1. HOOK: Shibi cool ngau deo kinh | Voice: Japanese slang to sound like a local
2. SETUP: Shibi chi vao camera | Voice: Stop sounding like a textbook... say this instead
3. Shibi lo tay lam roi do, cuoi | Tu: てへぺろ (tehepero) = oops | Voice
4. Shibi buc | Tu: キレる (kireru) = lose it / snap | Voice
5. Shibi nhay nhot | Tu: パリピ (paripi) = party people | Voice
6. Shibi confused | Tu: わかんない (wakannai) = I dont get it | Voice
7. Shibi cuoi lon | Tu: ウケる (ukeru) = thats funny | Voice
8. Shibi che | Tu: ダサい (dasai) = lame / cringe | Voice
9. Shibi bat ngo | Tu: マジ (maji) = for real? | Voice
10. ENDING: Shibi cool | Voice: Now you sound less like a textbook
11. CTA: Shibi chi xuong | Text: Follow Shibi for real Japanese | Voice off
nodes.title: CONCEPT INPUT

widgets_values:
Doi tuong: Gen Z, nguoi hoc tieng Nhat, fan anime
Nen tang: TikTok / YouTube Shorts / Instagram Reels (9:16 doc)
Tone: vui nhon, nhanh, hoc ma vui, meme-friendly
Phong cach: 2D flat cartoon mascot + text overlay lon ro rang
Muc tieu: nguoi xem nho duoc 2-3 tu tieng Nhat, follow de hoc tiep
nodes.title: TARGET AUDIENCE & TONE

widgets_values:
Thoi luong: 45-60 giay | So canh: 11 | FPS: 24 | Aspect: 9:16 (1080x1920)
Moi canh noi dung: 2-4 giay | Hook: 2 giay | CTA: 3 giay
nodes.title: VIDEO SPECS

widgets_values:
Ban la chuyen gia lam video ngan viral tren TikTok/Shorts. Phan tich concept va xay dung CAU TRUC VIDEO.

Video giao duc ngan theo pattern: HOOK -> SETUP -> NOI DUNG (loop) -> ENDING -> CTA

Tra ve CHINH XAC:

[HOOK] (1-2 giay)
Hinh anh: nhan vat lam gi, bieu cam nao
Text tren man hinh: dong chu gay chu y
Muc tieu: dung scroll, tao to mo

[SETUP] (2-3 giay)
Hinh anh: nhan vat hanh dong gi
Voice/Text: cau dan dat vao noi dung chinh

[NOI DUNG] (loop moi item 2-4 giay)
Moi item: nhan vat pose/bieu cam + tu vung/kien thuc + text overlay
Nhip do: nhanh, cat canh gon, khong keo dai

[ENDING] (2-3 giay)
Hinh anh: nhan vat ket
Voice/Text: cau ket dong lai noi dung

[CTA] (2-3 giay)
Hinh anh: nhan vat chi xuong/vay tay
Text: Follow + ten kenh
Voice: tat hoac nhe

[NHIP DO TONG]
Toc do cat: nhanh (2-4 giay/canh)
Nhac nen: vui, upbeat, co beat ro
Chuyen canh: cut nhanh, bounce, zoom
Phan tich cau truc video ngan:
nodes.title: LLM: Story Structure

widgets_values:
Ban la dao dien video ngan chuyen nghiep. Viet KICH BAN HOAN CHINH dang bang.

Format CHINH XAC cho MOI CANH (1 dong/canh, cac cot ngan cach bang | ):
scene_num | role | visual | noi_dung | voice | text_on_screen | duration

Giai thich cot:
- scene_num: so thu tu (1,2,3...)
- role: hook / setup / content / ending / cta
- visual: mo ta CHINH XAC nhan vat dang lam gi, bieu cam, tu the, phu kien (VD: Shibi cool deo kinh, Shibi buc tuc do mat, Shibi nhay nhot vui ve)
- noi_dung: noi dung hoc/thong tin trong canh (VD: tu vung, y nghia, vi du)
- voice: loi doc/narration cua canh (hoac "voice off" neu khong co)
- text_on_screen: CHU hien tren man hinh (tu vung lon + nghia nho ben duoi)
- duration: thoi luong giay (2-4s cho content, 1-2s cho hook)

Quy tac:
- Hook: 1-2 canh dau, bat mat ngay
- Setup: 1 canh gioi thieu chu de
- Content: cac canh noi dung chinh (moi canh = 1 don vi kien thuc)
- Ending: 1 canh ket
- CTA: 1 canh cuoi keu goi follow
- Tong thoi luong 45-60 giay
- Chi viet bang, KHONG giai thich gi them
nodes.title: LLM: Full Script

widgets_values:
Tu kich ban video, tao BANG POSE NHAN VAT (character pose sheet).

Voi MOI CANH trong kich ban, xac dinh:
- Nhan vat dang lam gi (tu the cu the)
- Bieu cam mat (vui/buon/gian/ngac nhien/cool...)
- Phu kien dac biet neu co (kinh, mu, khan...)
- Huong nhin (nhin camera, nhin sang, nhin xuong...)

Format MOI DONG (1 canh = 1 dong):
scene_num | pose: [tu the chi tiet] | expression: [bieu cam] | props: [phu kien] | facing: [huong nhin]

Vi du:
1 | pose: standing confidently with arms crossed | expression: cool smirk with sunglasses | props: round sunglasses | facing: looking at camera
2 | pose: pointing index finger at camera | expression: excited open mouth smile | props: none | facing: directly at camera
3 | pose: both hands up oops gesture, dropped item on floor | expression: embarrassed tongue out smile | props: none | facing: looking at camera sheepishly

SO DONG = SO CANH. Chi bang, khong giai thich.
nodes.title: LLM: Character Poses

widgets_values:
Tu kich ban + bang pose nhan vat, tao prompt TIENG ANH de tao ANH cho MOI CANH.

RANG BUOC BAT BUOC:
- Nhan vat LUON la cung mot mascot Shiba vang 2D flat cartoon, ti le dang tron gon, cream muzzle + cream belly, orange cheeks, black oval eyes, pink tongue, outline day sach.
- Khong duoc bien thanh nguoi that, ban than nguoi, realistic skin, realistic hair, 3D render, anime human, doll, UI, app screen, poster, typography, watermark.
- Moi canh phai la full body mascot, nam gon trong frame, khong crop dau, tai, tay, chan.
- Nen don gian, sach, it chi tiet, de trong vung negative space cho subtitle.
- Bo cuc portrait 9:16, mascot o giua khung hinh, doc ro ngay tren mobile.
- Moi canh chi thay doi pose, expression, props, va mau background theo kich ban.

Format moi dong (1 canh = 1 dong, KHONG xuong dong):
A clean 2D flat vector cartoon illustration of the same cute yellow Shiba mascot with cream muzzle and belly, orange cheeks, black oval eyes, pink tongue, thick clean outline, full body fully visible, centered in frame, [POSE from pose sheet], [EXPRESSION], [PROPS if any], simple pastel background with clear negative space for subtitles, portrait 9:16 composition, mobile-first framing, crisp edges, mascot-brand consistency, no text

SO DONG = SO CANH. Chi prompt, khong giai thich.
Tao image prompt cho moi canh:
nodes.title: LLM: Scene Image Prompts

widgets_values:
Tu kich ban + bang pose, tao prompt anh CUOI CANH (END frame) cho moi canh.

RANG BUOC BAT BUOC:
- Giu NGUYEN mascot Shiba vang 2D flat cartoon nhu start frame: cream muzzle + cream belly, orange cheeks, black oval eyes, pink tongue, outline day sach.
- Full body mascot phai nam gon trong frame, centered, portrait 9:16, khong crop bat ky bo phan nao.
- Khong tao nguoi that, realistic anatomy, UI, text, poster, watermark, speech bubble.
- END frame chi duoc thay doi NHE so voi START frame: nhich pose, doi expression, them mot it secondary action, giu cung background family.
- Muc tieu la tao cap keyframe de WanVideo noi chuyen dong mem, de doc, on dinh.

Format moi dong (1 canh = 1 dong, KHONG xuong dong):
A clean 2D flat vector cartoon illustration of the same cute yellow Shiba mascot with cream muzzle and belly, orange cheeks, black oval eyes, pink tongue, thick clean outline, full body fully visible, centered in frame, slight progression from the start pose, [EXPRESSION], [PROPS if any], simple pastel background matching the scene with subtle variation, portrait 9:16 composition, crisp edges, no text

SO DONG = SO CANH. Chi prompt, khong giai thich.
nodes.title: LLM: End Frame Prompts

widgets_values:
Tao MOTION PROMPT tieng Anh cho tung canh video ngan.
Day la video fast-cut TikTok style, moi canh 2-4 giay, nhung uu tien chat luong mascot 2D on dinh.

RANG BUOC:
- Chuyen dong ngan, de doc, khong qua phuc tap.
- Tranh camera move cuc manh, whip pan, xoay camera, blur manh, bien dang nhan vat.
- Uu tien subtle body motion + nhe camera push/pull de mascot giu dung shape.

Moi dong (1 canh = 1 dong):
[character motion] | [camera] | [speed] | [effect]

SO DONG = SO CANH. Chi prompt, khong giai thich.
nodes.title: LLM: Motion Prompts

widgets_values:
Ban la DOP (Director of Photography). Tu kich ban + storyboard, viet CAMERA BIBLE cho toan bo video.

Tra ve bang 1 dong/canh, cach nhau bang |:
scene_num | shot_type | lens_mm | camera_move | angle | lighting | color_temp

Giai thich:
- shot_type: wide/medium/close/extreme close
- lens_mm: 24/35/50/85 (dung cho kich thich mascot-friendly)
- camera_move: static/slow push/slow pull/slight dolly/handheld
- angle: eye/low/high/dutch (it dung cho mascot)
- lighting: soft-key/rim/bounce/golden/flat studio
- color_temp: warm 3200K / neutral 5600K / cool 6500K

Uu tien static hoac subtle push de giu mascot shape. SO DONG = SO CANH. Chi bang, khong giai thich.
nodes.title: LLM: DOP (Cinematography)

widgets_values:
Ban la EDITOR video ngan. Tu kich ban + DOP, viet EDIT PLAN.

Bang 1 dong/canh, cach nhau bang |:
scene_num | duration_s | in_point | out_point | transition_in | transition_out | beat_sync

Quy tac:
- duration_s: 2-4s content, 1-2s hook, 3s CTA
- in_point: 0 (day la I2V, moi canh bat dau tu START frame)
- out_point: duration (END frame)
- transition_in/out: cut / match-cut / whip / bounce / zoom (match voi beat nhac)
- beat_sync: on-beat / off-beat / half-beat (uu tien on-beat cho nhip nhanh)

Tong thoi luong ~60s. SO DONG = SO CANH.
nodes.title: LLM: Editor (Pacing)

widgets_values: text, letters, typography, font, label, caption, title, watermark, interface, UI, dashboard, app screen, window, dialog, popup, modal, menu, button, checkbox, list, grid, table, chart, form, toolbar, panel, frame, border, card, tooltip, palette swatch, color chart, infographic, poster, people, person, face, character, mascot, blurry, low quality, deformed, watermark
nodes.title: Style Negative (hardened)

widgets_values:
Tao 1 dong negative prompt tieng Anh cho toan bo video.
Bat buoc phai bao gom cac nhom loi sau de giu mascot on dinh:
- photorealistic human, realistic woman, realistic skin, realistic hair, human body
- cropped head, cut off ears, cut off hands, cut off feet, off-center subject
- extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed face, melted outline, inconsistent mascot proportions
- text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, UI, app screen, dashboard
- cluttered background, noisy background, low contrast subject
Format: 1 dong, cac tu cach nhau boi dau phay.
nodes.title: LLM: Negative Prompt

widgets_values: photorealistic, realistic woman, realistic skin, realistic hair, human, live action, 3d render, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, cropped head, cropped ears, cropped hands, cropped feet, off center subject, text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, interface, app screen, dashboard, cluttered background, noisy background
nodes.title: Negative (from LLM)

widgets_values: blurry, static, low quality, distorted, jerky motion, flickering, frozen, duplicate frames, morphing, face distortion, unnatural movement, abrupt cuts, inconsistent lighting, floating objects
nodes.title: WanVideo Text Encode

widgets_values:
Tu kich ban video, trich xuat voiceover cua tat ca cac canh.

Yeu cau:
- Ghep thanh mot doan van LIEN MACH, doc duoc tu nhien nhu narrator chuyen nghiep
- Giu nguyen ngon ngu goc
- Them ngat nghi tu nhien giua cac canh (dung dau ... hoac dau ,)
- Dieu chinh nhip doc: canh hook/climax nhanh hon, canh calm cham hon
- CHI TRA VE VAN BAN THUAN TUY, khong format, khong danh so

Chu y: Van ban nay se duoc doc boi AI voice (ElevenLabs/ChatterBox),
nen viet sao cho doc len tu nhien, tranh cau dai qua 30 tu.
nodes.title: LLM: Extract Voiceover

widgets_values:
ELEVENLABS VOICES GOI Y:
- Daniel (JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb): narrator tram, cinematic
- Rachel (21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM): nu, am ap, storytelling
- Antoni (ErXwobaYiN019PkySvjV): nam, tre, energetic
- Bella (EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL): nu, diu dang, intimate
nodes.title: Voice Guide

widgets_values:
Tu van ban voiceover, tao file SRT subtitle.
Uoc luong thoi gian doc moi cau dua tren so tu (trung binh 150 tu/phut tieng Viet, 160 tu/phut tieng Anh).

Format SRT CHINH XAC:
1
00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:03,500
Cau dau tien cua voiceover

2
00:00:03,800 --> 00:00:07,200
Cau tiep theo

Quy tac:
- Moi subtitle toi da 2 dong, moi dong toi da 42 ky tu
- Thoi gian hien thi toi thieu 1.5 giay, toi da 5 giay
- Khoang cach giua 2 subtitle toi thieu 0.2 giay
- Chia tai dau cau hoac dau phay, KHONG chia giua tu
- Tong thoi gian phu hop voi video 60 giay
nodes.title: LLM: Generate SRT

widgets_values:
CAPCUT POST-PRODUCTION GUIDE:
1. Import: eStudio_raw_for_capcut.mp4 + voiceover_output.flac
2. Import SRT: Copy noi dung SRT tu Preview vao file .srt
3. Music: Them nhac nen tu CapCut library (lofi, cinematic, ambient)
4. SFX: Them sound effects theo tung canh (footsteps, rain, city)
5. Pacing: Dieu chinh toc do tung clip (speed ramping)
6. Transitions: Them hieu ung chuyen canh (dissolve, whip pan)
7. Color grade: LUT cinematic (Teal & Orange, Warm Film)
8. Export: 1080p H.264, bitrate 10-15 Mbps
nodes.title: CapCut Guide

groups.title: STEP 4+5: SCENE PRODUCTION (Image + Video per Scene)
